name: Amelia Chen
shortBio: Covers Beijing and Xi'an with a focus on old-city pacing, museums, history-heavy neighborhoods, and landmark tradeoffs.
fullBio: Amelia Chen is a senior features editor at China Travel Notes. She leads coverage for Beijing and Xi'an, with additional responsibility for history-led northern and Silk Road-adjacent features. Her work focuses on helping readers turn heavyweight cultural destinations into trips that still feel usable, grounded, and well paced.
reviewProcess: Amelia reviews pages for cultural accuracy, neighborhood usefulness, museum fit, and whether a historically important stop still earns its place inside a realistic first-time route.
seoDescription: Read Beijing and Xi'an features and planning guides by Amelia Chen at China Travel Notes.
